description: Verified cross-language vocabulary table for KPK/GB languages. Sources: SIL International, CRULP Pakistan, Berger (1998) Burushaski Grammar, Willson (1999), Schmidt & Kaul (1986) Shina, Baart (2003) Hindko, Lorimer (1958) Wakhi, Trail & Cooper (1999) Kalasha, Lunsford (2001) Torwali, Read (1934) Balti, Badshah Munir Bukhari Khowar dictionary, Burushaski Research Academy Dictionary Vol.2.

notes.bsk: Burushaski — language isolate, 4 noun classes (hm/hf/x/y), SOV, Nastaliq/Latin
notes.hno: Hindko — Indo-Aryan, Hazara/Peshawar, close to Punjabi
notes.mvy: Indus Kohistani — critically endangered Dardic, Kohistan KPK
notes.bft: Balti — Tibetic, archaic Tibetan features, Baltistan
notes.wbl: Wakhi — Eastern Iranian, Gojal upper Hunza
notes.kls: Kalasha — Dardic, Chitral, polytheistic community, Latin-only script

bsk.notes: x-class noun; also the name of this app
stative: bimi = I know; baa bimi = I don't know
